titles.ar: باب الرَّجُلِ يَأْمُرُ رَجُلًا بِقَتْلِ رَجُلٍ
titles.en: Chapter 7 – The man orders a man with the killing of a man

titles.ar: باب الرَّجُلِ يَأْمُرُ رَجُلًا بِقَتْلِ رَجُلٍ
titles.en: Chapter 7 – The man orders a man with the killing of a man

segments: رَجُلٍ أَمَرَ رَجُلًا بِقَتْلِ رَجُلٍ فَقَتَلَهُ فَقَالَ يُقْتَلُ بِهِ الَّذِي قَتَلَهُ وَ يُحْبَسُ الْآمِرُ بِقَتْلِهِ فِي السِّجْنِ حَتَّى يَمُوتَ .
arabic.text: رَجُلٍ أَمَرَ رَجُلًا بِقَتْلِ رَجُلٍ فَقَتَلَهُ فَقَالَ يُقْتَلُ بِهِ الَّذِي قَتَلَهُ وَ يُحْبَسُ الْآمِرُ بِقَتْلِهِ فِي السِّجْنِ حَتَّى يَمُوتَ .

segments: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, and a number of our companions, from Sahl Bin Ziyad, both together from Ibn Mahboub, from Ibn Raib, from Zurara,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Ja’far<sup>asws</sup> regarding a man who orders a man with the killing of a man, so he killed him. So he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘The one who killed him should be killed, and the one who ordered with killing him should be held in the prison until he dies’.
en.hubeali.text:
Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, and a number of our companions, from Sahl Bin Ziyad, both together from Ibn Mahboub, from Ibn Raib, from Zurara,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Ja’far<sup>asws</sup> regarding a man who orders a man with the killing of a man, so he killed him. So he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘The one who killed him should be killed, and the one who ordered with killing him should be held in the prison until he dies’.

narratorChain.raw: مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ يَحْيَى عَنْ أَحْمَدَ بْنِ مُحَمَّدٍ وَ عِدَّةٌ مِنْ أَصْحَابِنَا عَنْ سَهْلِ بْنِ زِيَادٍ جَمِيعاً عَنِ ابْنِ مَحْبُوبٍ عَنِ ابْنِ رِئَابٍ عَنْ زُرَارَةَ عَنْ أَبِي جَعْفَرٍ ( عليه السلام ) فِي

titles.ar: باب الرَّجُلِ يَأْمُرُ رَجُلًا بِقَتْلِ رَجُلٍ
titles.en: Chapter 7 – The man orders a man with the killing of a man

segments: رَجُلٍ أَمَرَ عَبْدَهُ أَنْ يَقْتُلَ رَجُلًا فَقَتَلَهُ قَالَ فَقَالَ يُقْتَلُ السَّيِّدُ بِهِ .
arabic.text: رَجُلٍ أَمَرَ عَبْدَهُ أَنْ يَقْتُلَ رَجُلًا فَقَتَلَهُ قَالَ فَقَالَ يُقْتَلُ السَّيِّدُ بِهِ .

segments: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, and Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, both together from Ibn Mahboub, from Is’haq Bin Ammar,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> regarding a man who ordered his slave that he should kill a man, so he killed him. So he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘The master should be killed due to it’.
en.hubeali.text:
Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, and Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, both together from Ibn Mahboub, from Is’haq Bin Ammar,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> regarding a man who ordered his slave that he should kill a man, so he killed him. So he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘The master should be killed due to it’.

narratorChain.raw: مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ يَحْيَى عَنْ أَحْمَدَ بْنِ مُحَمَّدٍ وَ عَلِيُّ بْنُ إِبْرَاهِيمَ عَنْ أَبِيهِ جَمِيعاً عَنِ ابْنِ مَحْبُوبٍ عَنْ إِسْحَاقَ بْنِ عَمَّارٍ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) فِي

titles.ar: باب الرَّجُلِ يَأْمُرُ رَجُلًا بِقَتْلِ رَجُلٍ
titles.en: Chapter 7 – The man orders a man with the killing of a man

segments: قَالَ أَمِيرُ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ ( عليه السلام ) فِي رَجُلٍ أَمَرَ عَبْدَهُ أَنْ يَقْتُلَ رَجُلًا فَقَتَلَهُ فَقَالَ أَمِيرُ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ ( عليه السلام ) وَ هَلْ عَبْدُ الرَّجُلِ إِلَّا كَسَوْطِهِ أَوْ كَسَيْفِهِ يُقْتَلُ السَّيِّدُ بِهِ وَ يُسْتَوْدَعُ الْعَبْدُ السِّجْنَ .
arabic.text: قَالَ أَمِيرُ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ ( عليه السلام ) فِي رَجُلٍ أَمَرَ عَبْدَهُ أَنْ يَقْتُلَ رَجُلًا فَقَتَلَهُ فَقَالَ أَمِيرُ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ ( عليه السلام ) وَ هَلْ عَبْدُ الرَّجُلِ إِلَّا كَسَوْطِهِ أَوْ كَسَيْفِهِ يُقْتَلُ السَّيِّدُ بِهِ وَ يُسْتَوْدَعُ الْعَبْدُ السِّجْنَ .

segments: Ali, from his father, from Al Nowfaly, from Al Sakuny,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘Amir Al-Momineen<sup>asws</sup> said regarding a man who ordered his slave that he should kill a man, so he killed him. So Amir Al-Momineen<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘And is a slave of the man anything except like his whip, or like his sword? The master would be killed due to it, and the slave would be left in the prison’.
en.hubeali.text:
Ali, from his father, from Al Nowfaly, from Al Sakuny,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘Amir Al-Momineen<sup>asws</sup> said regarding a man who ordered his slave that he should kill a man, so he killed him. So Amir Al-Momineen<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘And is a slave of the man anything except like his whip, or like his sword? The master would be killed due to it, and the slave would be left in the prison’.

narratorChain.raw: عَلِيٌّ عَنْ أَبِيهِ عَنِ النَّوْفَلِيِّ عَنِ السَّكُونِيِّ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) قَالَ
